privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.heroSub: ความรู้สึกของคุณเป็นของคุณ
privacy.sum1body: Your entries are stored in encrypted cloud storage. Photos are served through private signed links that expire after 1 hour, so no one else can access them.
privacy.sum2body: No ads, no data brokers, no third-party analytics. Not now, and not in the future.
privacy.sum3body: Smart Log uses Google Gemini for analysis. You decide when to use it, and your notes aren't stored on AI servers.
privacy.sum4title: Export or delete at any time
privacy.sum4body: Export all your data in one tap. Delete your account in one tap. Everything goes together.
privacy.s1body: Mood entries, notes, photos and tags you create. Your email and display name. Your accent color and language preference. That's the complete list.
privacy.s2body: When you tap **Analyze with AI**, your note is sent to Google Gemini over TLS, analyzed for mood and tags, and the response is returned to you. We don't store your note on the AI server. You can turn this off in Settings → Privacy & data.
privacy.s3body: Attached photos are stored in Cloudflare R2 and accessed via signed URLs that expire after 1 hour. This prevents anyone from hotlinking or sharing your image links.
privacy.s4body: We use third-party services to support the app: **Cloudflare** for hosting and storage, **Google Gemini** for AI analysis, **Resend** for transactional email, **Stripe** for payment processing, and **Google** for OAuth login. Each service processes only the data necessary for its role.
privacy.s5body: We retain your data for as long as your account is active. When you delete your account, everything is permanently removed — entries, images, AI cache, and achievements.
privacy.s6body: Export all your data at Settings → Data. Delete your account anytime from Profile → Edit. Turn off AI features to use the app as a simple journal.
privacy.s7body: Questions about your data? Reach us at hello@dailymood.me

terms.title: Terms
terms.heroSub: ข้อตกลงการใช้งานแบบเข้าใจง่าย
terms.sum1body: You must be at least 13 to use the app. Under 18? Please get permission from a parent or guardian.
terms.sum2body: Use the app for personal purposes. No scraping, no misuse, and no reverse-engineering.
terms.sum3body: Cancel anytime in your subscription settings. Refunds follow Stripe's policy.
terms.sum4body: DailyMood helps you reflect on your moods. It is not therapy or medical advice.
terms.s1body: You are responsible for keeping your password secure. We recommend using a real email so we can help you recover your account if needed.
terms.s2body: Do not attempt to break the app, access other users' data, or reverse-engineer the AI. Use the app for personal mood tracking, not for commercial purposes.
terms.s3body: DailyMood Pro is billed monthly or yearly through Stripe. You can cancel anytime from your subscription settings. Your access continues until the end of your current billing period.
terms.s4body: Your mood entries, notes, and photos belong to you. We do not claim ownership of your content. We only access it when necessary to provide the service, such as when you request AI analysis.
terms.s5body: DailyMood is provided as-is. We do our best to keep things running smoothly, but we cannot guarantee 100% uptime or perfect AI accuracy. We are not liable for decisions you make based on AI Insights.
terms.s6body: We may update these terms from time to time. When we do, we will notify you by email or in-app notice. Continued use of the app after changes means you accept the updated terms.

aiDisclaimer.chat: AI can be wrong — don't take it as health advice.
aiDisclaimer.analysis: Just an AI perspective — use it as input, not a verdict.
aiDisclaimer.ask: Just AI ideas — not always right.
aiDisclaimer.story: AI wrote this story — some parts may not be accurate.
aiDisclaimer.parse: AI may get it wrong — double-check before saving.
